title: elephantopus tomentosus
intro: Elephantopus tomentosus, also known as the hairy elephantopus or hairy elephant's head, is a plant species native to Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Elephantopus tomentosus is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, and is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory and skin infections.
